changelog:
v2.0.1 (2026-03-21)

  • Fix: GSC proxy now recognizes Search Console as active when Site Kit is connected (Search Console is Site Kit's implicit core module and may not appear in googlesitekit_active_modules)

v2.0.0 (2026-03-16)

  • Major: Full browserless wp-admin control — 26 new REST API endpoints
  • Bulk audit, schema, and Rank Math meta operations
  • Content search/grep and search-replace across all posts
  • Rank Math redirections CRUD (single + bulk)
  • Plugin activate/deactivate/update, theme switch
  • Menu, sitemap, options, maintenance, cron, user audit
  • Webhooks, GSC proxy via Site Kit, debug log, filesystem, SQL
  • Comment moderation, widgets, theme mods, rewrite rules
  • Security: SQL injection hardening, credential redaction, path traversal fix
